compiled_state.title: Create RED test suite: test-reviewer-blindspot-annotations.sh with 5 failing tests and .test-index entries
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Create tests/docs/test-reviewer-blindspot-annotations.sh with 5 test functions in declaration order (deep_hygiene, deep_correctness, deep_arch, standard, light). Each function creates its own TMPDIR, runs build-review-agents.sh --output TMPDIR, and asserts section header presence via assert_eq. File sources tests/lib/assert.sh. Dispatch block uses print_summary not exit $?. print_summary is last line. Add 5 separate .test-index entries with RED marker [test_blindspot_in_deep_hygiene] on deep-hygiene entry only.
